title: Commercial Terms in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger commercial terms in practice judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Commercial Terms in Practice is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Commercial Terms in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good commercial terms in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Commercial Terms in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
